# FILE: tsconfig.json

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{ "name": "next" }],
    "paths": { "@/*": ["./src/*"] }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   TOAST
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
let _toastTimer;
function showToast(msg, icon='✅') {
  const t = $('toast');
  t.innerHTML = icon + ' ' + msg;
  t.classList.add('show');
  clearTimeout(_toastTimer);
  _toastTimer = setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2600);
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   RIPPLE EFFECT
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function addRipple(e) {
  const btn = e.currentTarget;
  const r = document.createElement('span');
  r.className = 'ripple';
  const rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
  const size = Math.max(rect.width, rect.height);
  r.style.cssText = `width:${size}px;height:${size}px;left:${e.clientX-rect.left-size/2}px;top:${e.clientY-rect.top-size/2}px`;
  btn.appendChild(r);
  setTimeout(() => r.remove(), 600);
}
document.querySelectorAll('.ripple-host').forEach(b => b.addEventListener('click', addRipple));

   AUTH — localStorage
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const AUTH_KEY = 'specduel_users';
const SESSION_KEY = 'specduel_session';

function getUsers() {
  try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(AUTH_KEY)) || {}; }
  catch { return {}; }
}
function saveUsers(u) { localStorage.setItem(AUTH_KEY, JSON.stringify(u)); }
function getSession() {
  try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(SESSION_KEY)); }
  catch { return null; }
}
function saveSession(s) { localStorage.setItem(SESSION_KEY, JSON.stringify(s)); }
function clearSession() { localStorage.removeItem(SESSION_KEY); }

function renderNavAuth() {
  const zone = $('navAuthZone');
  const session = getSession();
  if (session) {
    const initials = session.name.split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2);
    zone.innerHTML = `
      <div class="nav-user-wrap">
        <div class="nav-avatar">${initials}</div>
        <span class="nav-user-name">Hi, ${session.name.split(' ')[0]}</span>
        <button class="nav-auth-btn logout-mode" id="logoutBtn">Logout</button>
      </div>`;
    $('logoutBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      clearSession();
      renderNavAuth();
      showToast('Logged out. See you soon!', '👋');
    });
  } else {
    zone.innerHTML = `<button class="nav-auth-btn ripple-host" id="openAuthBtn">🔑 Login / Sign Up</button>`;
    $('openAuthBtn').addEventListener('click', openModal);
    $('openAuthBtn').addEventListener('click', addRipple);
  }
}

function openModal(tab='login') {
  $('authModal').style.display = 'block';
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  if (tab === 'signup') switchToTab('signup');
  else switchToTab('login');
  clearModalErrors();
}
function closeModal() {
  $('authModal').style.display = 'none';
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
function switchToTab(tab) {
  $('tabLogin').classList.toggle('active', tab === 'login');
  $('tabSignup').classList.toggle('active', tab === 'signup');
  $('loginForm').style.display = tab === 'login' ? 'block' : 'none';
  $('signupForm').style.display = tab === 'signup' ? 'block' : 'none';
  clearModalErrors();
}
function clearModalErrors() {
  [$('loginErr'), $('signupErr')].forEach(el => { el.classList.remove('show'); });
  [$('loginEmail'), $('loginPass'), $('signupName'), $('signupEmail'), $('signupPass')]
    .forEach(el => el && el.classList.remove('error-field'));
}

function setupAuth() {
  $('modalClose').addEventListener('click', closeModal);
  $('modalOverlay').addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === $('modalOverlay')) closeModal(); });
  $('tabLogin').addEventListener('click', () => switchToTab('login'));
  $('tabSignup').addEventListener('click', () => switchToTab('signup'));
  $('switchToSignup').addEventListener('click', () => switchToTab('signup'));
  $('switchToLogin').addEventListener('click', () => switchToTab('login'));

  // Login
  $('loginSubmit').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const email = $('loginEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase();
    const pass  = $('loginPass').value;
    if (!email || !pass) { showFieldError('loginErr', 'Please fill in both fields.'); return; }
    const users = getUsers();
    if (!users[email] || users[email].password !== pass) {
      showFieldError('loginErr', '❌ Incorrect email or password.');
      $('loginEmail').classList.add('error-field');
      $('loginPass').classList.add('error-field');
      return;
    }
    saveSession({ email, name: users[email].name });
    closeModal();
    renderNavAuth();
    showToast(`Welcome back, ${users[email].name}! 🎉`);
  });

  // Signup
  $('signupSubmit').addEventListener('click', () => {
    const name  = $('signupName').value.trim();
    const email = $('signupEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase();
    const pass  = $('signupPass').value;
    if (!name) { showFieldError('signupErr', 'Please enter your name.'); $('signupName').classList.add('error-field'); return; }
    if (!email || !email.includes('@')) { showFieldError('signupErr', 'Please enter a valid email.'); $('signupEmail').classList.add('error-field'); return; }
    if (pass.length < 6) { showFieldError('signupErr', 'Password must be at least 6 characters.'); $('signupPass').classList.add('error-field'); return; }
    const users = getUsers();
    if (users[email]) { showFieldError('signupErr', 'This email is already registered. Please login.'); $('signupEmail').classList.add('error-field'); return; }
    users[email] = { name, password: pass };
    saveUsers(users);
    saveSession({ email, name });
    closeModal();
    renderNavAuth();
    showToast(`Account created! Welcome to SpecDuel, ${name} 🚀`);
  });

  // Enter key support
  [$('loginEmail'), $('loginPass')].forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') $('loginSubmit').click(); });
  });
  [$('signupName'), $('signupEmail'), $('signupPass')].forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') $('signupSubmit').click(); });
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && $('authModal').style.display !== 'none') closeModal();
  });
}

function showFieldError(id, msg) {
  const el = $(id);
  el.textContent = msg;
  el.classList.add('show');
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   BRANDS DATA — 12 smartphone brands
   Primary: Wikipedia SVGs (proper brand wordmarks)
   Fallback: Flaticon PNGs → coloured letter
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const BRANDS = [
  {
    name:'Apple',
    logo:'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/f/fa/Apple_logo_black.svg',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/0/747.png',
    color:'#1d1d1f'
  },
  {
    name:'Samsung',
    logo:'data:image/avif;base64,',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/882/882704.png',
    color:'#1428A0'
  },
  {
    name:'Google',
    logo:'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/2f/Google_2015_logo.svg',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/300/300221.png',
    color:'#4285F4'
  },
  {
    name:'OnePlus',
    logo:'data:image/webp;base64,',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/5969/5969282.png',
    color:'#F5010C'
  },
  {
    name:'Xiaomi',
    logo:'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/29/Xiaomi_logo.svg',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/5969/5969085.png',
    color:'#FF6900'
  },
  {
    name:'Nothing',
    logo:'data:image/avif;base64,',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/5969/5968705.png',
    color:'#111111'
  },
  {
    name:'Sony',
    logo:'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/ca/Sony_logo.svg',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/882/882726.png',
    color:'#003087'
  },
  {
    name:'Motorola',
    logo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/882/882741.png',
    color:'#E1140A'
  },
  {
    name:'Realme',
    logo:'data:image/png;base64,',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/5969/5969073.png',
    color:'#FFD700'
  },
  {
    name:'Oppo',
    logo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/882/882748.png',
    color:'#1D8348'
  },
  {
    name:'Vivo',
    logo:'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/e/e5/Vivo_mobile_logo.png',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/5969/5968773.png',
    color:'#415FFF'
  },
  {
    name:'Asus',
    logo:'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/2e/ASUS_Logo.svg',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/882/882749.png',
    color:'#00539B'
  },
  {
    name:'Infinix',
    logo:'data:image/png;base64,',
    logoFallback:'https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/5969/5969085.png',
    color:'#ff0000'
  }
];

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   BRANDS — render cards + drag-to-scroll + click filter
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function setupBrands() {
  const track = $('brandsTrack');

  /* ── Build brand cards dynamically ── */
  BRANDS.forEach(brand => {
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'brand-card';
    card.dataset.brand = brand.name;

    /* Logo wrapper */
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'brand-logo-wrap';

    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.alt = brand.name;
    img.loading = 'lazy';
    img.decoding = 'async';

    /* ── Two-tier fallback chain ──
       1st attempt : Wikipedia SVG (real brand wordmark)
       2nd attempt : Flaticon PNG (on SVG load failure)
       3rd attempt : Coloured letter tile (if both fail)   */
    let fallbackUsed = false;
    img.src = brand.logo;

    img.onerror = function() {
      if (!fallbackUsed) {
        // Try the PNG fallback
        fallbackUsed = true;
        this.src = brand.logoFallback;
      } else {
        // Both failed — show coloured letter
        this.style.display = 'none';
        const fb = document.createElement('div');
        fb.className = 'brand-logo-fallback';
        fb.style.background = brand.color;
        fb.textContent = brand.name.charAt(0);
        wrap.appendChild(fb);
      }
    };

    wrap.appendChild(img);

    /* Name label */
    const label = document.createElement('span');
    label.className = 'brand-name';
    label.textContent = brand.name;

    card.appendChild(wrap);
    card.appendChild(label);
    track.appendChild(card);
  });

  /* ── Drag-to-scroll ── */
  let isDown = false, startX, scrollLeft, didDrag = false;
  track.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
    isDown = true; didDrag = false;
    track.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
    startX = e.pageX - track.offsetLeft;
    scrollLeft = track.scrollLeft;
  });
  track.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { isDown = false; track.style.cursor = 'grab'; });
  track.addEventListener('mouseup',    () => { isDown = false; track.style.cursor = 'grab'; });
  track.addEventListener('mousemove',  e => {
    if (!isDown) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    didDrag = true;
    const x = e.pageX - track.offsetLeft;
    track.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - (x - startX) * 1.2;
  });

  /* ── Click-to-filter highlight (skip if user just dragged) ── */
  track.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (didDrag) return;
    const card = e.target.closest('.brand-card');
    if (!card) return;
    const brandName = card.dataset.brand;
    const wasActive = card.classList.contains('active');

    /* Toggle off if clicking active card */
    track.querySelectorAll('.brand-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('active'));
    if (!wasActive) {
      card.classList.add('active');
      showToast(`Showing ${brandName} phones — use budget filter below 📱`, '🏷️');
    }
  });
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   POPULAR FEATURES
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function setupFeatures() {
  const FEAT_FILTERS = {
    '5g':       p => p.scores.perf >= 7.0,
    'ram8':     p => parseInt(p.specs?.ram) >= 8,
    'storage256': p => p.price >= 25000,
    'slim':     p => p.tier === 'premium' || p.tier === 'flagship',
    '120hz':    p => p.year >= 2022 && p.scores.perf >= 7,
    'ai':       p => p.year >= 2023 && p.scores.perf >= 8.5,
  };
  const FEAT_RANGES = {
    '5g':       [0, 999999],
    'ram8':     [20000, 999999],
    'storage256':[30000, 999999],
    'slim':     [30000, 999999],
    '120hz':    [15000, 999999],
    'ai':       [50000, 999999],
  };
  document.querySelectorAll('.feat-item').forEach(item => {
    item.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const feat = item.dataset.feat;
      document.querySelectorAll('.feat-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('active'));
      item.classList.add('active');
      const [min, max] = FEAT_RANGES[feat];
      const filterFn = FEAT_FILTERS[feat];
      // Activate budget filter with feature subset
      state.budgetPhones = sortPhones(PHONES.filter(p => p.price >= min && p.price <= max && filterFn(p)));
      renderBudgetCards(state.budgetPhones);
      DOM.budgetResults._hasScrolled = false;
      document.querySelectorAll('.bp-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      const label = item.querySelector('.feat-label').textContent;
      showToast(`Filtered: ${label}`, '⚡');
    });
  });
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   WEIGHTS / HELPERS
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function getCombinedWeights() {
  const active = state.priorities;
  if (!active.length) return WEIGHTS.daily;
  const sum = { perf:0, camera:0, battery:0 };
  active.forEach(p => { sum.perf += WEIGHTS[p].perf; sum.camera += WEIGHTS[p].camera; sum.battery += WEIGHTS[p].battery; });
  const n = active.length;
  return { perf: sum.perf/n, camera: sum.camera/n, battery: sum.battery/n };
}
function shortName(name) { if (!name) return '—'; return name.length > 18 ? name.slice(0, 16) + '…' : name; }

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   INIT
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function init() {
  setupSearch('A'); setupSearch('B');
  setupAuth(); renderNavAuth();
  setupBrands(); setupFeatures();
  renderFeaturedPhones();
  initPDP();

  document.querySelectorAll('.p-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const p = btn.dataset.p, idx = state.priorities.indexOf(p);
      if (idx === -1) { state.priorities.push(p); btn.classList.add('active'); }
      else { if (state.priorities.length === 1) return; state.priorities.splice(idx, 1); btn.classList.remove('active'); }
      renderPriorityTags();
      if (!DOM.budgetResults.hidden && state.budgetPhones.length) renderBudgetCards(sortPhones(state.budgetPhones));
    });
  });
  renderPriorityTags();
  DOM.compareBtn.addEventListener('click', handleCompare);
  DOM.errClose.addEventListener('click', () => { DOM.errBar.hidden = true; });
  DOM.resetBtn.addEventListener('click', resetUI);
  setupBudget();
}

const PRIORITY_LABELS = { gaming:'🎮 Gaming', camera:'📸 Camera', daily:'📱 Daily Use', battery:'🔋 Battery' };
function renderPriorityTags() {
  DOM.priorityTags.innerHTML = state.priorities.map(p => `<span class="p-tag">${PRIORITY_LABELS[p]}</span>`).join('');
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SEARCH / DROPDOWN
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function setupSearch(slot) {
  const input = DOM[`in${slot}`], drop = DOM[`drop${slot}`], clr = DOM[`clr${slot}`];
  input.addEventListener('input', () => {
    const q = input.value.trim();
    clr.classList.toggle('show', q.length > 0);
    if (state[`sel${slot}`]) { state[`sel${slot}`] = null; input.classList.remove('chosen'); DOM[`chip${slot}`].classList.remove('show'); updateFloating(); }
    q ? renderDrop(slot, q) : closeDrop(slot);
  });
  input.addEventListener('focus', () => { if (input.value.trim()) renderDrop(slot, input.value.trim()); });
  input.addEventListener('keydown', e => keyNav(e, slot));
  document.addEventListener('click', e => { if (!input.contains(e.target) && !drop.contains(e.target)) closeDrop(slot); });
  clr.addEventListener('click', () => clearSlot(slot));
}
function renderDrop(slot, q) {
  const drop = DOM[`drop${slot}`], lq = q.toLowerCase();
  const hits = PHONES.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(lq)).slice(0, 8);
  drop.innerHTML = '';
  if (!hits.length) { const li = document.createElement('li'); li.className = 'empty'; li.textContent = 'No phones found'; drop.appendChild(li); }
  else hits.forEach((p, idx) => {
    const li = document.createElement('li');
    li.dataset.idx = idx;
    li.setAttribute('role','option');
    li.innerHTML = hlMatch(p.name, q) + `<span style="float:right;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--t4);font-family:var(--mono)">₹${p.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</span>`;
    li.addEventListener('click', () => pick(slot, p));
    drop.appendChild(li);
  });
  drop.classList.add('open');
}
function hlMatch(name, q) {
  const idx = name.toLowerCase().indexOf(q.toLowerCase());
  if (idx === -1) return esc(name);
  return esc(name.slice(0, idx)) + `<span class="hl">${esc(name.slice(idx, idx+q.length))}</span>` + esc(name.slice(idx+q.length));
}
function closeDrop(slot) { DOM[`drop${slot}`].classList.remove('open'); }
function keyNav(e, slot) {
  const drop = DOM[`drop${slot}`], items = [...drop.querySelectorAll('li:not(.empty)')];
  if (!items.length) return;
  const hi = drop.querySelector('.hi');
  if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') { e.preventDefault(); const next = hi ? (items.indexOf(hi)+1) % items.length : 0; hi?.classList.remove('hi'); items[next].classList.add('hi'); }
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') { e.preventDefault(); const prev = hi ? (items.indexOf(hi)-1+items.length) % items.length : items.length-1; hi?.classList.remove('hi'); items[prev].classList.add('hi'); }
  else if (e.key === 'Enter' && hi) hi.click();
  else if (e.key === 'Escape') closeDrop(slot);
}
function pick(slot, phone) {
  state[`sel${slot}`] = phone;
  DOM[`in${slot}`].value = phone.name;
  DOM[`in${slot}`].classList.add('chosen');
  DOM[`clr${slot}`].classList.add('show');
  DOM[`chip${slot}`].classList.add('show');
  closeDrop(slot); updateFloating(); updateBudgetCardStates(); updateSlotIndicators();
}
function clearSlot(slot) {
  state[`sel${slot}`] = null;
  DOM[`in${slot}`].value = ''; DOM[`in${slot}`].classList.remove('chosen');
  DOM[`clr${slot}`].classList.remove('show'); DOM[`chip${slot}`].classList.remove('show');
  closeDrop(slot); updateFloating(); updateBudgetCardStates(); updateSlotIndicators();
}
function updateFloating() {
  const ready = !!(state.selA && state.selB);
  if (ready) { DOM.floatingCompare.classList.add('visible'); DOM.floatChipA.textContent = shortName(state.selA.name); DOM.floatChipB.textContent = shortName(state.selB.name); DOM.compareBtn.disabled = false; }
  else { DOM.floatingCompare.classList.remove('visible'); DOM.compareBtn.disabled = true; }
  updateBudgetCompareBtn();
}
function updateBudgetCompareBtn() {
  const ready = !!(state.selA && state.selB);
  DOM.budgetCompareBtn.classList.toggle('ready', ready);
  $('budgetCompareBtnLabel').textContent = ready ? '⚡ Compare Now' : '⚡ Select 2 phones';
}
function updateSlotIndicators() {
  const a = state.selA, b = state.selB;
  DOM.slotIndA.className = 'slot-indicator' + (a ? ' filled-a' : '');
  DOM.slotIndB.className = 'slot-indicator' + (b ? ' filled-b' : '');
  DOM.slotIndAText.textContent = a ? `Slot A — ${shortName(a.name)}` : 'Slot A — empty';
  DOM.slotIndBText.textContent = b ? `Slot B — ${shortName(b.name)}` : 'Slot B — empty';
}
function updateBudgetCardStates() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.bpc').forEach(card => {
    const name = card.dataset.phoneName;
    const btnA = card.querySelector('[data-slot-btn="A"]'), btnB = card.querySelector('[data-slot-btn="B"]');
    if (!btnA || !btnB) return;
    const inA = state.selA && state.selA.name === name, inB = state.selB && state.selB.name === name;
    btnA.className = 'bpc-slot-btn' + (inA ? ' filled-a' : ''); btnA.textContent = inA ? '✓ Slot A' : '+ Slot A';
    btnB.className = 'bpc-slot-btn' + (inB ? ' filled-b' : ''); btnB.textContent = inB ? '✓ Slot B' : '+ Slot B';
    card.classList.toggle('in-slot-a', inA); card.classList.toggle('in-slot-b', inB);
  });
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   COMPARE LOGIC (original, fully intact)
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function handleCompare() {
  if (!state.selA || !state.selB) { showErr('Please select two phones first.'); return; }
  if (state.selA.name === state.selB.name) { showErr('Please pick two different phones.'); return; }
  const btn = DOM.compareBtn; btn.classList.add('loading');
  setTimeout(() => { btn.classList.remove('loading'); runCompare(state.selA, state.selB); }, 480);
}
function showErr(msg) { DOM.errMsg.textContent = msg; DOM.errBar.hidden = false; setTimeout(() => { DOM.errBar.hidden = true; }, 3500); }
function runCompare(pA, pB) {
  const w = getCombinedWeights();
  const sA = (pA.scores.perf*w.perf + pA.scores.camera*w.camera + pA.scores.battery*w.battery).toFixed(2);
  const sB = (pB.scores.perf*w.perf + pB.scores.camera*w.camera + pB.scores.battery*w.battery).toFixed(2);
  const winnerIsA = parseFloat(sA) >= parseFloat(sB);
  DOM.emptyState.hidden = true; DOM.results.hidden = false;
  DOM.caName.textContent = pA.name; DOM.cbName.textContent = pB.name;
  DOM.caImg.src = pA.image; DOM.caImg.alt = pA.name; DOM.cbImg.src = pB.image; DOM.cbImg.alt = pB.name;
  buildScoreRows(DOM.caScores, pA.scores); buildScoreRows(DOM.cbScores, pB.scores);
  DOM.cardA.classList.toggle('winner', winnerIsA); DOM.cardB.classList.toggle('winner', !winnerIsA);
  DOM.caWinner.classList.toggle('show', winnerIsA); DOM.cbWinner.classList.toggle('show', !winnerIsA);
  DOM.saName.textContent = pA.name; DOM.saNum.textContent = sA; DOM.sbName.textContent = pB.name; DOM.sbNum.textContent = sB;
  const winner = winnerIsA ? pA : pB, loser = winnerIsA ? pB : pA;
  const wScore = winnerIsA ? sA : sB, lScore = winnerIsA ? sB : sA;
  const diff = (parseFloat(wScore) - parseFloat(lScore)).toFixed(2);
  DOM.winnerTitle.textContent = `Winner: ${winner.name}`;
  DOM.winnerDesc.textContent = diff === '0.00' ? `It's a tie! Both score ${wScore}/10.` : `Leads by ${diff} points (${wScore} vs ${lScore}). ${buildWinnerReason(winner, loser, w)}`;
  DOM.resultsSubtitle.textContent = 'Priority: ' + state.priorities.map(p => ({ gaming:'Gaming', camera:'Camera', daily:'Daily Use', battery:'Battery' }[p])).join(', ');
  buildInsights(pA, pB); buildPredictions(pA, pB);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    DOM.results.querySelectorAll('.fill[data-w]').forEach(el => { el.style.width = el.dataset.w + '%'; });
  }));
  DOM.results.scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth', block:'start' });
}
function buildWinnerReason(winner, loser, w) {
  const s = winner.scores, lo = loser.scores;
  const diffs = [{key:'perf',d:s.perf-lo.perf,label:'performance'},{key:'camera',d:s.camera-lo.camera,label:'camera'},{key:'battery',d:s.battery-lo.battery,label:'battery'}].filter(x=>x.d>0).sort((a,b)=>b.d-a.d);
  if (!diffs.length) return 'Comparable across all categories.';
  return `Stronger ${diffs[0].label}${diffs[1] ? ` and ${diffs[1].label}` : ''}.`;
}
function buildScoreRows(container, scores) {
  const rows = [{label:'Performance',icon:'⚡',key:'perf',cls:'fill-perf'},{label:'Camera',icon:'📸',key:'camera',cls:'fill-camera'},{label:'Battery',icon:'🔋',key:'battery',cls:'fill-battery'}];
  const w = getCombinedWeights(), overall = scores.perf*w.perf + scores.camera*w.camera + scores.battery*w.battery;
  const allRows = [...rows, {label:'Overall',icon:'⭐',key:'overall',cls:'fill-overall',val:overall}];
  container.innerHTML = allRows.map(r => {
    const val = r.val !== undefined ? r.val : scores[r.key], pct = (val/10)*100;
    return `<div class="score-row"><div class="row-meta"><span class="row-lbl">${r.icon} ${r.label}</span><span class="row-val">${val.toFixed(1)}</span></div><div class="track"><div class="fill ${r.cls}" data-w="${pct.toFixed(1)}" style="width:0"></div></div></div>`;
  }).join('');
}
function buildInsights(pA, pB) {
  const grid = DOM.insightGrid; grid.innerHTML = '';
  const dominantPriority = state.priorities.reduce((best, p) => {
    const bw = WEIGHTS[best], pw = WEIGHTS[p];
    return Math.max(pw.perf,pw.camera,pw.battery) > Math.max(bw.perf,bw.camera,bw.battery) ? p : best;
  }, state.priorities[0]);
  const insights = [
    { name: pA.name, lines: genInsight(pA, dominantPriority) },
    { name: pB.name, lines: genInsight(pB, dominantPriority) },
    { name:'Performance', lines: pA.scores.perf > pB.scores.perf ? `${pA.name} has the faster chipset (${pA.scores.perf}/10 vs ${pB.scores.perf}/10). Better for gaming and multitasking.` : `${pB.name} leads in raw processing (${pB.scores.perf}/10 vs ${pA.scores.perf}/10). Handles intensive tasks smoother.`, tag: pA.scores.perf===pB.scores.perf?{text:'Equal',cls:'warn'}:{text:'Advantage',cls:'great'} },
    { name:'Battery Life', lines: pA.scores.battery > pB.scores.battery ? `${pA.name} lasts longer on a single charge (${pA.scores.battery}/10 vs ${pB.scores.battery}/10).` : `${pB.name} wins on endurance (${pB.scores.battery}/10 vs ${pA.scores.battery}/10). Fewer charges per day.`, tag:{text:'Compared',cls:'good'} },
  ];
  insights.forEach(({name,lines,tag}) => {
    const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'insight-block';
    const linesText = typeof lines==='string' ? lines : lines.text;
    const lineTag = typeof lines==='object' && lines.tag ? `<span class="ib-tag ${lines.tag.cls}">${lines.tag.text}</span>` : '';
    div.innerHTML = `<div class="ib-name">${esc(name)}</div><div class="ib-line">${esc(linesText)}</div>${tag ? `<span class="ib-tag ${tag.cls}">${tag.text}</span>` : lineTag}`;
    grid.appendChild(div);
  });
}
function genInsight(phone, priority) {
  const s = phone.scores;
  const strong = Object.entries({perf:s.perf,camera:s.camera,battery:s.battery}).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1])[0][0];
  const labels = {perf:'processing speed',camera:'camera system',battery:'battery life'};
  const priorityMatchMap = {gaming:'perf',camera:'camera',daily:'perf',battery:'battery'};
  const aligns = state.priorities.some(p => priorityMatchMap[p] === strong);
  const text = `Strongest in ${labels[strong]} (${s[strong]}/10). ${aligns ? 'Aligns perfectly with your priority.' : 'A solid all-rounder.'}`;
  return { text, tag: s[strong]>=9?{text:'Excellent',cls:'great'}:s[strong]>=7.5?{text:'Good',cls:'good'}:{text:'Average',cls:'warn'} };
}
function buildPredictions(pA, pB) {
  const rows = DOM.predRows; rows.innerHTML = '';
  [pA, pB].forEach(phone => {
    const avgScore = (phone.scores.perf+phone.scores.camera+phone.scores.battery)/3, age = 2025-phone.year;
    let badge, badgeCls, pred;
    if (phone.tier==='flagship' && phone.scores.perf>=9.0) { badge='Top Tier'; badgeCls='top'; pred=`Flagship hardware ensures smooth performance for 3–4 years. Software support likely until ${phone.year+4}.`; }
    else if (avgScore>=8.5 && age<=2) { badge='Long Term'; badgeCls='long'; pred=`Premium specs mean it stays fast for 2–3 years. Expect solid performance through ${phone.year+3}.`; }
    else if (avgScore>=7.0 && age<=3) { badge='Moderate'; badgeCls='long'; pred=`Good for everyday tasks for 2 years. May lag with heavier apps by ${phone.year+2}.`; }
    else { badge='Aging'; badgeCls='short'; pred='Performance may drop noticeably with future OS updates. Consider upgrading soon.'; }
    const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'pred-row';
    div.innerHTML = `<span class="pred-phone">${esc(phone.name)}</span><span class="pred-line">${esc(pred)}</span><span class="pred-badge ${badgeCls}">${badge}</span>`;
    rows.appendChild(div);
  });
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   BUDGET FILTER (original fully intact)
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function setupBudget() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.bp-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.bp-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      const max = parseInt(btn.dataset.max), min = parseInt(btn.dataset.min);
      DOM.budgetInput.value = max >= 999999 ? '' : max;
      DOM.budgetInput.placeholder = max >= 999999 ? 'No upper limit' : `Up to ₹${max.toLocaleString('en-IN')}`;
      document.querySelectorAll('.feat-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('active'));
      runBudgetFilter(min, max);
    });
  });
  DOM.budgetFindBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const val = parseInt(DOM.budgetInput.value);
    if (!val || val < 1000) { DOM.budgetInput.focus(); DOM.budgetInput.style.borderColor = '#ef4444'; setTimeout(() => { DOM.budgetInput.style.borderColor = ''; }, 1200); return; }
    document.querySelectorAll('.bp-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.feat-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('active'));
    runBudgetFilter(0, val);
  });
  DOM.budgetInput.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') DOM.budgetFindBtn.click(); });
  DOM.budgetSearchInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
    if (!state.budgetPhones.length) return;
    const q = DOM.budgetSearchInput.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    renderBudgetCards(q ? state.budgetPhones.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)) : state.budgetPhones);
  });
  DOM.budgetCompareBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { if (state.selA && state.selB) handleCompare(); });
}
function sortPhones(phones) {
  const w = getCombinedWeights();
  return [...phones].sort((a, b) => (b.scores.perf*w.perf+b.scores.camera*w.camera+b.scores.battery*w.battery) - (a.scores.perf*w.perf+a.scores.camera*w.camera+a.scores.battery*w.battery));
}
function runBudgetFilter(minPrice, maxPrice) {
  state.budgetMin = minPrice; state.budgetMax = maxPrice;
  DOM.budgetSearchInput.value = '';
  state.budgetPhones = sortPhones(PHONES.filter(p => p.price >= minPrice && p.price <= maxPrice));
  renderBudgetCards(state.budgetPhones);
}
function renderBudgetCards(phones) {
  const grid = DOM.budgetGrid, count = DOM.budgetCount;
  grid.innerHTML = '';
  if (phones.length === 0) {
    grid.innerHTML = `<div class="budget-empty" style="grid-column:1/-1"><div class="budget-empty-icon">🔍</div><p>No phones found.<br>Try adjusting your budget or search.</p></div>`;
    count.textContent = '0 results'; DOM.budgetResults.hidden = false; return;
  }
  count.textContent = `${phones.length} phone${phones.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} found`;
  const w = getCombinedWeights();
  phones.forEach((phone, idx) => {
    const overall = (phone.scores.perf*w.perf + phone.scores.camera*w.camera + phone.scores.battery*w.battery).toFixed(1);
    const isBest = idx === 0, delay = idx * 0.055;
    const inA = state.selA && state.selA.name === phone.name, inB = state.selB && state.selB.name === phone.name;
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'bpc' + (isBest?' best-choice':'') + (inA?' in-slot-a':'') + (inB?' in-slot-b':'');
    card.style.animationDelay = `${delay}s`; card.dataset.phoneName = phone.name;
    const specsHtml = phone.specs ? `<div class="bpc-specs"><span class="bpc-spec">💾 ${phone.specs.ram}</span><span class="bpc-spec">📷 ${phone.specs.camera}</span><span class="bpc-spec">🔋 ${phone.specs.battery}</span></div>` : '';
    card.innerHTML = `
      ${isBest ? '<div class="best-tag">⭐ Best Match</div>' : ''}
      <div class="bpc-img-wrap">
        <img class="bpc-img" src="${esc(phone.image||'')}" alt="${esc(phone.name)}" loading="lazy" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.nextElementSibling.style.display='block'"/>
        <span class="img-fallback">📱</span>
      </div>
      <div class="bpc-body">
        <div class="bpc-name">${esc(phone.name)}</div>
        <div class="bpc-price">₹${phone.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div>
        ${specsHtml}
        ${buildMiniScoreRow('Perf', phone.scores.perf, 'fill-perf')}
        ${buildMiniScoreRow('Camera', phone.scores.camera, 'fill-camera')}
        ${buildMiniScoreRow('Battery', phone.scores.battery, 'fill-battery')}
        <div class="bpc-overall"><span class="bpc-overall-lbl">Overall Score</span><span class="bpc-overall-num">${overall}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="bpc-actions">
        <button class="bpc-slot-btn ${inA?'filled-a':''}" data-slot-btn="A">${inA?'✓ Slot A':'+ Slot A'}</button>
        <button class="bpc-slot-btn ${inB?'filled-b':''}" data-slot-btn="B">${inB?'✓ Slot B':'+ Slot B'}</button>
      </div>`;
    card.querySelector('[data-slot-btn="A"]').addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); pick('A', phone); });
    card.querySelector('[data-slot-btn="B"]').addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); pick('B', phone); });
    card.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target.closest('.bpc-actions')) return; openProductDetail(phone); });
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
  DOM.budgetResults.hidden = false; updateSlotIndicators();
  requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    grid.querySelectorAll('.bpc-fill[data-w]').forEach(el => { el.style.width = el.dataset.w + '%'; });
  }));
  if (!DOM.budgetResults._hasScrolled) {
    DOM.budgetResults._hasScrolled = true;
    setTimeout(() => { DOM.budgetResults.scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth', block:'start' }); }, 100);
  }
}
let _fillOrder = [];
function smartFill(phone) {
  if (!state.selA) { pick('A', phone); _fillOrder = ['A']; }
  else if (!state.selB && state.selA.name !== phone.name) { pick('B', phone); _fillOrder = ['A','B']; }
  else { const oldest = _fillOrder[0] || 'A'; pick(oldest, phone); _fillOrder = _fillOrder.filter(s => s !== oldest); _fillOrder.push(oldest); }
}
function buildMiniScoreRow(label, val, fillClass) {
  const pct = (val/10)*100;
  return `<div class="bpc-score-row"><span class="bpc-score-label">${label}</span><div class="bpc-track"><div class="bpc-fill ${fillClass}" data-w="${pct}" style="width:0"></div></div><span class="bpc-val">${val.toFixed(1)}</span></div>`;
}
function resetUI() {
  clearSlot('A'); clearSlot('B'); _fillOrder = [];
  DOM.results.hidden = true; DOM.emptyState.hidden = false; DOM.errBar.hidden = true;
  window.scrollTo({ top:0, behavior:'smooth' });
}
function esc(str) { return String(str).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;'); }
