/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   FEATURED PHONES — render 5 hero cards
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const FEATURED_NAMES = [
  "Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max",
  "Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra",
  "OnePlus 12",
  "Xiaomi 14",
  "Google Pixel 8 Pro",
];

function renderFeaturedPhones() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('featuredGrid');
  if (!grid) return;
  FEATURED_NAMES.forEach((name, i) => {
    const phone = PHONES.find(p => p.name === name);
    if (!phone) return;
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'fp-card';
    card.style.animationDelay = `${i * 0.09}s`;
    const badgeText = phone.tier === 'flagship' ? '🏆 Flagship' : phone.year >= 2024 ? '✨ New' : '⭐ Popular';
    const badgeCls  = phone.tier === 'flagship' ? 'flagship' : phone.year >= 2024 ? 'new' : 'premium';
    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="fp-img-wrap">
        <span class="fp-badge ${badgeCls}">${badgeText}</span>
        <img class="fp-img" src="${esc(phone.image)}" alt="${esc(phone.name)}" loading="lazy"
          onerror="this.style.display='none'"/>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-body">
        <div class="fp-name">${esc(phone.name)}</div>
        <div class="fp-price">₹${phone.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</div>
        <div class="fp-specs-mini">
          <span class="fp-spec-chip">💾 ${phone.specs.ram}</span>
          <span class="fp-spec-chip">📷 ${phone.specs.camera}</span>
          <span class="fp-spec-chip">🔋 ${phone.specs.battery}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-actions">
        <button class="fp-btn-details">👁 View Details</button>
        <button class="fp-btn-compare">+ Compare</button>
      </div>`;
    card.querySelector('.fp-btn-details').addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); openProductDetail(phone); });
    card.querySelector('.fp-btn-compare').addEventListener('click', e => { e.stopPropagation(); pick('A', phone); showToast(`${phone.name.split(' ').slice(-2).join(' ')} added to Slot A`, '⚡'); });
    card.addEventListener('click', () => openProductDetail(phone));
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PRODUCT DETAIL PAGE — open / close
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
let _pdpPhone = null, _pdpScrollY = 0;

function openProductDetail(phone) {
  _pdpPhone = phone;
  _pdpScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const overlay    = document.getElementById('pdpOverlay');
  const breadcrumb = document.getElementById('pdpBreadcrumb');
  if (!overlay) return;
  breadcrumb.textContent = phone.name;
  renderPDPMain(phone);
  renderPDPSpecs(phone);
  overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
  overlay.scrollTop = 0;
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    overlay.classList.add('open');
  });
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  // Animate score bars after slide completes
  setTimeout(() => {
    overlay.querySelectorAll('.pdp-score-fill[data-w]').forEach(el => {
      el.style.width = el.dataset.w + '%';
    });
  }, 520);
}

function closeProductDetail() {
  const overlay = document.getElementById('pdpOverlay');
  if (!overlay || !overlay.classList.contains('open')) return;
  overlay.classList.remove('open');
  overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
  setTimeout(() => window.scrollTo(0, _pdpScrollY), 460);
}

function compareFromDetail() {
  const phone = _pdpPhone;
  if (!phone) return;
  closeProductDetail();
  setTimeout(() => {
    pick('A', phone);
    showToast(`${phone.name.split(' ').slice(-2).join(' ')} added to Slot A — pick Slot B!`, '⚡');
    setTimeout(() => {
      const sel = document.querySelector('.selector-section');
      if (sel) sel.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    }, 300);
  }, 520);
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PDP — render main (left image + right info)
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function renderPDPMain(phone) {
  const container = document.getElementById('pdpMain');
  if (!container) return;
  const tierMap   = { flagship:'🏆 Flagship', premium:'⭐ Premium', mid:'📱 Mid-Range', budget:'💰 Budget' };
  const tierClass = `pdp-tier-${phone.tier}`;
  const isNew     = phone.year >= 2024;
  // Star rating: map 0–10 avg score → 1–5
  const avg       = (phone.scores.perf + phone.scores.camera + phone.scores.battery) / 3;
  const star      = Math.min(5, ((avg / 10) * 3.5 + 1.5)).toFixed(1);
  const full      = Math.floor(star);
  const half      = (star - full) >= 0.4;
  const stars     = '★'.repeat(full) + (half ? '✩' : '') + '☆'.repeat(5 - full - (half ? 1 : 0));

  container.innerHTML = `
    <!-- LEFT: IMAGE -->
    <div class="pdp-image-col">
      <div class="pdp-img-stage">
        <img class="pdp-phone-img" src="${esc(phone.image)}" alt="${esc(phone.name)}" loading="eager"
          onerror="this.style.display='none';this.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend','<div style=font-size:5rem>📱</div>')"/>
      </div>
      <button class="pdp-view-photos" onclick="showToast('Photo gallery coming soon!','🖼')">🖼&nbsp; View All Photos</button>
    </div>

    <!-- RIGHT: INFO -->
    <div class="pdp-info-col">
      <div class="pdp-tier-row">
        <span class="pdp-tier-badge ${tierClass}">${tierMap[phone.tier] || phone.tier}</span>
        ${isNew ? '<span class="pdp-new-tag">✨ New ' + phone.year + '</span>' : ''}
      </div>
      <h1 class="pdp-phone-name">${esc(phone.name)}</h1>
      <div class="pdp-rating-row">
        <span class="pdp-stars">${stars}</span>
        <span class="pdp-rating-num">${star} / 5</span>
        <span class="pdp-rating-count">(Expert Score)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pdp-price-row">
        <span class="pdp-price">₹${phone.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}</span>
        <span class="pdp-price-label">MRP incl. all taxes</span>
      </div>

      <!-- KEY SPECS STRIP -->
      <div class="pdp-key-specs">
        <div class="pdp-ks">
          <div class="pdp-ks-icon">💾</div>
          <div class="pdp-ks-val">${esc(phone.specs.ram)}</div>
          <div class="pdp-ks-label">Memory</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pdp-ks">
          <div class="pdp-ks-icon">📷</div>
          <div class="pdp-ks-val">${esc(phone.specs.camera)}</div>
          <div class="pdp-ks-label">Camera</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pdp-ks">
          <div class="pdp-ks-icon">🔋</div>
          <div class="pdp-ks-val">${esc(phone.specs.battery)}</div>
          <div class="pdp-ks-label">Battery</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- SCORE BARS -->
      <div class="pdp-scores">
        <div class="pdp-scores-title">Performance Scores</div>
        <div class="pdp-score-row">
          <span class="pdp-score-label">Performance</span>
          <div class="pdp-score-track"><div class="pdp-score-fill perf" data-w="${phone.scores.perf * 10}" style="width:0"></div></div>
          <span class="pdp-score-val">${phone.scores.perf} / 10</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pdp-score-row">
          <span class="pdp-score-label">Camera</span>
          <div class="pdp-score-track"><div class="pdp-score-fill cam" data-w="${phone.scores.camera * 10}" style="width:0"></div></div>
          <span class="pdp-score-val">${phone.scores.camera} / 10</span>
        </div>
        <div class="pdp-score-row">
          <span class="pdp-score-label">Battery</span>
          <div class="pdp-score-track"><div class="pdp-score-fill bat" data-w="${phone.scores.battery * 10}" style="width:0"></div></div>
          <span class="pdp-score-val">${phone.scores.battery} / 10</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- COMPARE CTA -->
      <button class="pdp-compare-btn" id="pdpCompareBtn">⚡&nbsp; + Add to Compare</button>
    </div>`;

  container.querySelector('#pdpCompareBtn').addEventListener('click', compareFromDetail);
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PDP — render spec tables
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function renderPDPSpecs(phone) {
  const container = document.getElementById('pdpSpecs');
  if (!container) return;
  const x = PHONE_EXT[phone.name] || {};

  const group = (title, icon, rows) => {
    const rowsHtml = rows
      .filter(([, v]) => v)
      .map(([k, v]) => `<div class="pdp-spec-row">
        <div class="pdp-spec-key">${esc(k)}</div>
        <div class="pdp-spec-val">${esc(String(v))}</div>
      </div>`).join('');
    if (!rowsHtml) return '';
    return `<div class="pdp-specs-group">
      <div class="pdp-specs-group-title">${icon}&nbsp; ${title}</div>
      ${rowsHtml}
    </div>`;
  };

  container.innerHTML = `
    <div class="pdp-specs-section-title">📋 Full Specifications</div>
    ${group('Key Specs', '⚡', [
      ['Brand / Model',    phone.name],
      ['Launch Price',     `₹${phone.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}`],
      ['Year Released',    String(phone.year)],
      ['Segment',          phone.tier.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + phone.tier.slice(1)],
      ['Operating System', x.os || (phone.name.includes('Apple') ? 'iOS' : 'Android')],
      ['Storage Options',  x.storage || '—'],
    ])}
    ${group('Performance', '🎮', [
      ['Processor / SoC',  x.processor || '—'],
      ['RAM',              phone.specs.ram],
      ['Network',          x.network || '5G'],
      ['Perf Score',       `${phone.scores.perf} / 10`],
    ])}
    ${group('Display', '🖥️', [
      ['Screen',           x.display || '—'],
    ])}
    ${group('Camera', '📸', [
      ['Main Camera',      phone.specs.camera],
      ['Camera Score',     `${phone.scores.camera} / 10`],
    ])}
    ${group('Battery', '🔋', [
      ['Capacity',         phone.specs.battery],
      ['Charging',         x.charging || '—'],
      ['Battery Score',    `${phone.scores.battery} / 10`],
    ])}
    ${group('Physical', '📐', [
      ['Weight',           x.weight || '—'],
    ])}`;
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PDP — init listeners
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function initPDP() {
  const backBtn = document.getElementById('pdpBackBtn');
  if (backBtn) backBtn.addEventListener('click', closeProductDetail);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      const overlay = document.getElementById('pdpOverlay');
      if (overlay && overlay.classList.contains('open')) { closeProductDetail(); e.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
    }
  }, true); // capture phase so it runs before auth modal handler
}

function __boot(){init();}if(document.readyState==='loading')document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',__boot);else __boot();

################################################################################
# FILE: src\app\globals.css
################################################################################

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ROOT VARIABLES
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
:root{
  --bg:#f1f5f9;--bg-2:#f8fafc;--bg-card:#fff;
  --border:#e2e8f0;--border-strong:#cbd5e1;--border-accent:rgba(37,99,235,.35);
  --a1:#2563eb;--a2:#7c3aed;--a3:#db2777;--a4:#059669;--a5:#d97706;
  --t1:#0f172a;--t2:#334155;--t3:#64748b;--t4:#94a3b8;
  --shadow-sm:0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,.07),0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.05);
  --shadow-md:0 4px 12px rgba(15,23,42,.08),0 2px 4px rgba(15,23,42,.05);
  --shadow-lg:0 10px 24px rgba(15,23,42,.09),0 4px 8px rgba(15,23,42,.05);
  --shadow-xl:0 20px 40px rgba(15,23,42,.10),0 8px 16px rgba(15,23,42,.05);
  --r-card:16px;--r-input:10px;--r-btn:50px;
  --ff:'Outfit',sans-serif;--mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  --ease:cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);--spring:cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px}
body{
  background-color:#f1f5f9;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%,rgba(37,99,235,.06) 0%,transparent 55%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 10%,rgba(124,58,237,.05) 0%,transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(circle,#e2e8f0 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:auto,auto,28px 28px;
  color:var(--t1);font-family:var(--ff);line-height:1.6;
  overflow-x:hidden;min-height:100vh;
  animation:bodyReveal .5s var(--ease) both
}
@keyframes bodyReveal{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.bg-scene{display:none}
#app{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:1060px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px 160px}

/* ── NAV ── */
.site-nav{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:18px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  position:sticky;top:0;z-index:200;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.95);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px)
}
.logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;text-decoration:none}
.logo-mark{width:34px;height:34px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));border-radius:10px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:15px}
.logo-name{font-weight:800;font-size:1.15rem;letter-spacing:-.03em;color:var(--t1)}
.nav-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.nav-pill{font-size:.73rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t3);background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:99px;padding:6px 14px}

/* Auth button states */
.nav-auth-btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));
  border:none;border-radius:var(--r-btn);padding:9px 20px;
  color:#fff;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s var(--spring),box-shadow .2s var(--ease);
  box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(37,99,235,.28);white-space:nowrap;position:relative;overflow:hidden
}
.nav-auth-btn::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.15),transparent 60%);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s
}
.nav-auth-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.04) translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(37,99,235,.38)}
.nav-auth-btn:hover::after{opacity:1}
.nav-auth-btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.nav-auth-btn.logout-mode{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b);box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(71,85,105,.25)}
.nav-auth-btn.logout-mode:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(71,85,105,.38)}
.nav-user-name{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t2);max-width:110px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
.nav-user-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.nav-avatar{
  width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));
  display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0
}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{text-align:center;padding:72px 0 52px;animation:heroUp .7s var(--ease) .1s both;position:relative}
.hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:700px;height:420px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(37,99,235,.07) 0%,transparent 65%);pointer-events:none;z-index:0}
@keyframes heroUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.hero-eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--a1);background:rgba(37,99,235,.08);border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.2);border-radius:99px;padding:6px 16px;margin-bottom:24px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.eyebrow-dot{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--a1);border-radius:50%;animation:pulse 2s ease infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(.7)}}
.hero-title{font-size:clamp(2.6rem,6.5vw,4.8rem);font-weight:900;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.04em;margin-bottom:14px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-title .word-plain{color:var(--t1)}
.hero-title .word-grad{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1) 0%,var(--a2) 60%,var(--a3) 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.hero-tagline{font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--t2);margin-bottom:14px;letter-spacing:-.01em;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-sub{font-size:.97rem;color:var(--t3);max-width:500px;margin:0 auto 36px;line-height:1.7;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-stats{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:40px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.stat{text-align:center}
.stat-num{font-size:1.45rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;color:var(--t1)}
.stat-lbl{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t4);margin-top:2px}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   FEATURED BRANDS SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.section-header{display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:18px}
.section-title{font-size:1.12rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.025em;color:var(--t1)}
.section-sub{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--t4);font-weight:500}

.brands-section{
  margin-top:48px;
  background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-card);
  padding:24px 28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-md);
  animation:sectionUp .65s var(--ease) .15s both
}
@keyframes sectionUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

.brands-track{
  display:flex;gap:12px;overflow-x:auto;
  padding-bottom:8px;padding-top:4px;
  scrollbar-width:none;-ms-overflow-style:none;cursor:grab;
  /* smooth momentum scroll on iOS */
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch
}
.brands-track:active{cursor:grabbing}
.brands-track::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}

/* ── Individual brand card ── */
.brand-card{
  flex-shrink:0;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
  width:116px;
  padding:18px 14px 14px;
  background:#fff;
  border:1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:16px;
  cursor:pointer;user-select:none;
  box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(15,23,42,.05);
  transition:
    transform .22s var(--spring),
    box-shadow .22s var(--ease),
    border-color .2s var(--ease),
    background .2s var(--ease)
}
.brand-card:hover{
  transform:translateY(-6px) scale(1.05);
  box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(15,23,42,.12),0 4px 8px rgba(15,23,42,.06);
  border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.4);
  background:#fafbff
}
.brand-card:focus-visible{
  outline:none;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.3)
}
.brand-card.active{
  border-color:var(--a1);
  background:#eff6ff;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.12),0 8px 24px rgba(37,99,235,.1)
}

/* ── Logo container — wide enough for horizontal wordmarks ── */
.brand-logo-wrap{
  width:90px;
  height:46px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  flex-shrink:0;
  position:relative
}
/* The actual img tag — scales to fit container while preserving ratio */
.brand-logo-wrap img{
  max-width:80%;
  max-height:40px;
  width:auto;
  height:auto;
  object-fit:contain;
  display:block;
  filter:none
}
/* Subtle grayscale → color on hover */
.brand-card:not(:hover):not(.active) .brand-logo-wrap img{
  filter:grayscale(20%) opacity(.85)
}
.brand-card:hover .brand-logo-wrap img,
.brand-card.active .brand-logo-wrap img{
  filter:none
}

/* Fallback: coloured pill with letter — only shows if image fails */
.brand-logo-fallback{
  width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:900;color:#fff;
  letter-spacing:-.02em;flex-shrink:0;
  box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.15)
}

/* ── Brand name label ── */
.brand-name{
  font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--t4);text-align:center;
  line-height:1.25;
  word-break:break-word;
  max-width:100%
}
.brand-card:hover .brand-name,
.brand-card.active .brand-name{
  color:var(--a1)
}

@media(max-width:480px){
  .brand-card{width:98px;padding:14px 10px 12px;gap:10px}
  .brand-logo-wrap{width:76px;height:38px}
  .brand-logo-wrap img{max-width:76px;max-height:36px}
  .brands-section{padding:18px 16px}
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   POPULAR FEATURES SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.features-section{
  margin-top:28px;
  background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-card);
  padding:24px 28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-md);
  animation:sectionUp .65s var(--ease) .2s both
}
.features-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px
}
@media(max-width:600px){.features-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.feat-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  padding:11px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .18s var(--ease);background:var(--bg)
}
.feat-item:hover{
  background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.3);
  transform:translateX(3px) translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm)
}
.feat-item.active{
  background:#eff6ff;border-color:var(--a1);
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.1)
}
.feat-icon{
  width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:9px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));
  display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:.95rem;flex-shrink:0;
  box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(37,99,235,.25)
}
.feat-icon.green{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#059669,#10b981)}
.feat-icon.purple{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7)}
.feat-icon.orange{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#f59e0b)}
.feat-icon.pink{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#db2777,#ec4899)}
.feat-icon.teal{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0891b2,#06b6d4)}
.feat-icon.red{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#dc2626,#ef4444)}
.feat-text{min-width:0}
.feat-label{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.feat-desc{font-size:.67rem;color:var(--t4);margin-top:1px}
.feat-arrow{margin-left:auto;color:var(--t4);font-size:.75rem;flex-shrink:0;transition:transform .18s}
.feat-item:hover .feat-arrow{transform:translateX(3px);color:var(--a1)}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   STEP BADGE
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.step-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t4);margin-bottom:14px}
.step-num{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:800;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}

/* ── CARD BASE ── */
.glass{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-card);box-shadow:var(--shadow-md);transition:box-shadow .25s var(--ease),border-color .25s var(--ease)}
.glass:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);border-color:var(--border-strong)}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   BUDGET FILTER
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.budget-section{margin-top:36px;animation:sectionUp .65s var(--ease) .25s both}
.budget-panel{padding:28px 30px}
.budget-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px}
.budget-icon-wrap{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(217,119,6,.1);border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,.2);display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:15px}
.budget-hdr-text{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--a5)}
.budget-presets{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px}
.bp-btn{background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 16px;color:var(--t2);font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:background .18s,border-color .18s,color .18s,transform .18s var(--spring),box-shadow .18s}
.bp-btn:hover{background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.3);color:var(--a1);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.bp-btn.active{background:#eff6ff;border-color:var(--a1);color:var(--a1);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.1)}
.budget-input-row{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center}
.budget-input-wrap{position:relative;flex:1}
.budget-prefix{position:absolute;left:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.85rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--a5);pointer-events:none}
.budget-input{width:100%;background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-input);padding:11px 16px 11px 32px;color:var(--t1);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.9rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.budget-input::placeholder{color:var(--t4)}
.budget-input:focus{border-color:var(--a1);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.1)}
.budget-find-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#f59e0b);border:none;border-radius:var(--r-btn);padding:12px 26px;color:#fff;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;transition:transform .2s var(--spring),box-shadow .2s;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(217,119,6,.28)}
.budget-find-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.04) translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(217,119,6,.38)}
.budget-find-btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}

.budget-results{margin-top:32px}
.budget-results-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
.budget-results-headline-row{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:12px}
.budget-results-headline-row h2{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;color:var(--t1)}
.budget-count{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;color:var(--t4)}
.budget-search-wrap{position:relative;flex:1;min-width:160px;max-width:280px}
.budget-search-ico{position:absolute;left:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--t4);pointer-events:none;display:flex;align-items:center}
.budget-search-input{width:100%;background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 14px 9px 36px;color:var(--t1);font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.82rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.budget-search-input::placeholder{color:var(--t4)}
.budget-search-input:focus{border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.4);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.08)}
.budget-compare-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));border:none;border-radius:var(--r-btn);padding:10px 22px;color:#fff;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;transition:transform .2s var(--spring),box-shadow .2s,opacity .2s;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,.25);opacity:.45;pointer-events:none}
.budget-compare-btn.ready{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.budget-compare-btn.ready:hover{transform:scale(1.04) translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(37,99,235,.38)}
.budget-compare-btn.ready:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.slot-indicators{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.slot-indicator{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;padding:5px 13px;border-radius:99px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);color:var(--t4);background:white;transition:all .22s var(--ease)}
.slot-indicator.filled-a{color:var(--a4);border-color:rgba(5,150,105,.4);background:#f0fdf4}
.slot-indicator.filled-b{color:var(--a1);border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.4);background:#eff6ff}
.slot-indicator-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor;flex-shrink:0}
.budget-cards-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px}

/* ── Budget phone card ── */
.bpc{background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);transition:border-color .25s,box-shadow .25s,transform .25s var(--spring);position:relative;cursor:pointer;animation:bpcReveal .4s var(--spring) both}
@keyframes bpcReveal{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px) scale(.96)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.bpc:hover{border-color:var(--border-strong);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);transform:translateY(-5px) scale(1.005)}
.bpc:hover .bpc-img{transform:scale(1.06)}
.bpc.best-choice{border-color:rgba(217,119,6,.45);box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(217,119,6,.14),var(--shadow-sm)}
.bpc.best-choice::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#d97706,#fbbf24,#d97706);background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 2.5s linear infinite}
@keyframes shimmer{to{background-position:200% 0}}
.bpc.in-slot-a{border-color:rgba(5,150,105,.5)!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(5,150,105,.08),var(--shadow-sm)!important}
.bpc.in-slot-b{border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.5)!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.08),var(--shadow-sm)!important}
.best-tag{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;z-index:10;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:white;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#f59e0b);border-radius:8px;padding:4px 10px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(217,119,6,.3);animation:tagPop .4s var(--spring) .3s both}
@keyframes tagPop{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.8)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}
.bpc-img-wrap{width:100%;height:170px;overflow:hidden;background:#f8fafc;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;transition:background .25s}
.bpc:hover .bpc-img-wrap{background:#f1f5f9}
.bpc-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:16px;transition:transform .4s var(--ease);animation:imgFadeIn .5s var(--ease) both}
@keyframes imgFadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.03)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}
.bpc-img-wrap .img-fallback{font-size:3rem;display:none}
.bpc-body{padding:15px 16px 12px}
.bpc-name{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;line-height:1.35;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:4px}
.bpc-price{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:1.02rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--a5);margin-bottom:10px;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.bpc-specs{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;margin-bottom:12px}
.bpc-spec{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--t3);background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 8px}
.bpc-score-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:5px}
.bpc-score-label{font-size:.64rem;font-weight:500;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--t4);width:70px;flex-shrink:0}
.bpc-track{flex:1;height:3px;background:#f1f5f9;border-radius:99px;overflow:hidden}
.bpc-fill{height:100%;border-radius:99px;width:0;transition:width .9s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
.fill-perf{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#2563eb,#60a5fa)}
.fill-camera{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#7c3aed,#a78bfa)}
.fill-battery{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#059669,#34d399)}
.fill-overall{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#d97706,#fbbf24)}
.bpc-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.64rem;color:var(--t3);width:22px;text-align:right;flex-shrink:0}
.bpc-overall{margin-top:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.bpc-overall-lbl{font-size:.64rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--t4)}
.bpc-overall-num{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.bpc-actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;padding:10px 16px 14px}
.bpc-slot-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:5px;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 6px;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:white;color:var(--t4);transition:all .18s;white-space:nowrap}
.bpc-slot-btn:hover{background:var(--bg);border-color:var(--border-strong);color:var(--t2)}
.bpc-slot-btn.filled-a{background:#f0fdf4;border-color:rgba(5,150,105,.4);color:var(--a4)}
.bpc-slot-btn.filled-b{background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.4);color:var(--a1)}
.budget-empty{text-align:center;padding:48px 24px;color:var(--t4);border:1px dashed var(--border-strong);border-radius:14px;background:white}
.budget-empty-icon{font-size:2.4rem;margin-bottom:12px}
.budget-empty p{font-size:.88rem}

/* ── Divider ── */
.or-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin:28px 0;color:var(--t4);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase}
.or-divider::before,.or-divider::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border)}

/* ── Selector ── */
.selector-section{animation:sectionUp .65s var(--ease) .25s both}
.selector-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 52px 1fr;gap:16px;align-items:start;padding:28px}
.phone-slot{position:relative}
.slot-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px}
.slot-num{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(37,99,235,.08);border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.2);display:grid;place-items:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--a1)}
.slot-title{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t3)}
.slot-fill-chip{display:none;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:99px;background:rgba(5,150,105,.08);border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.25);color:var(--a4);margin-left:auto}
.slot-fill-chip.show{display:flex}
.search-wrap{position:relative}
.search-ico{position:absolute;left:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--t4);pointer-events:none;display:flex;align-items:center}
.phone-input{width:100%;background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-input);padding:12px 40px 12px 42px;color:var(--t1);font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.92rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.phone-input::placeholder{color:var(--t4)}
.phone-input:focus{border-color:var(--a1);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.1)}
.phone-input.chosen{border-color:rgba(5,150,105,.5);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(5,150,105,.08)}
.clear-x{position:absolute;right:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:none;border:none;color:var(--t4);cursor:pointer;font-size:.78rem;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:6px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .15s,color .15s,background .15s}
.clear-x.show{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.clear-x:hover{color:var(--t2);background:var(--bg)}
.drop{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 6px);left:0;right:0;background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;list-style:none;max-height:230px;overflow-y:auto;z-index:300;display:none;box-shadow:var(--shadow-xl);scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:var(--border) transparent}
.drop.open{display:block;animation:dropReveal .16s var(--ease) both}
@keyframes dropReveal{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-6px) scale(.98)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.drop li{padding:10px 16px;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--t2);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:background .12s,color .12s}
.drop li:last-child{border:none}
.drop li:hover,.drop li.hi{background:var(--bg);color:var(--t1)}
.drop li .hl{color:var(--a1);font-weight:700}
.drop li.empty{color:var(--t4);font-style:italic;cursor:default;pointer-events:none}
.vs-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding-top:44px;gap:8px}
.vs-line{width:1px;height:36px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,var(--border),transparent)}
.vs-chip{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--a1);background:rgba(37,99,235,.08);border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:5px 9px}

/* ── Priority ── */
.priority-section{margin-top:24px;animation:sectionUp .65s var(--ease) .3s both}
.priority-panel{padding:24px 28px}
.priority-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px}
.priority-title{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t2)}
.priority-hint{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--t4)}
.priority-desc{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--t4);margin-bottom:16px;line-height:1.5}
.priority-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px}
.p-btn{background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px 12px;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;color:var(--t1);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .18s,border-color .18s,transform .18s var(--spring),box-shadow .18s}
.p-btn:hover{background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.3);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.p-btn.active{background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.5);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.08)}
.p-btn.active .p-check{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}
.p-icon{font-size:1.4rem;display:block;margin-bottom:6px}
.p-label{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t2)}
.p-check{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));margin:6px auto 0;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:.6rem;color:#fff;opacity:0;transform:scale(.5);transition:opacity .2s,transform .25s var(--spring)}
.priority-active-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;min-height:28px}
.p-tag{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:99px;background:rgba(37,99,235,.08);border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.25);color:var(--a1);animation:tagPop .3s var(--spring) both}

/* ── Floating Compare ── */
.floating-compare{position:fixed;bottom:28px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(100px);z-index:500;transition:transform .4s var(--spring),opacity .3s;opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
.floating-compare.visible{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.compare-btn-float{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1) 0%,var(--a2) 100%);border:none;border-radius:var(--r-btn);padding:15px 42px;color:#fff;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.96rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:transform .22s var(--spring),box-shadow .22s;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(37,99,235,.38),0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.compare-btn-float:hover{transform:scale(1.04) translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(37,99,235,.5)}
.compare-btn-float:active{transform:scale(.97)}
.compare-btn-float.loading .btn-spinner{opacity:1;width:16px;height:16px}
.btn-spinner{width:0;height:0;border:2.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);border-top-color:white;border-radius:50%;opacity:0;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;transition:width .2s,height .2s,opacity .2s}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.float-phone-chips{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.fpc{color:rgba(255,255,255,.88);font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;max-width:100px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
.fpc-vs{color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);font-size:.65rem;flex-shrink:0}
.btn-label{font-size:.94rem;font-weight:700}

/* ── Error bar ── */
.error-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:#fef2f2;border:1px solid #fecaca;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;margin-top:16px;font-size:.85rem;color:#dc2626;font-weight:500}
.error-bar-close{margin-left:auto;background:none;border:none;color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:6px;transition:background .15s}
.error-bar-close:hover{background:#fee2e2}

/* ── Results ── */
.results{margin-top:40px}
.results-headline{margin-bottom:20px}
.results-headline h2{font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;color:var(--t1)}
.results-headline p{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--t4);margin-top:3px}
.cards-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;margin-bottom:20px}
.phone-card{background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:22px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-md);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow .3s,border-color .3s,transform .25s var(--spring);animation:cardReveal .5s var(--spring) both}
@keyframes cardReveal{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.96)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
#card-a{animation-delay:.1s}#card-b{animation-delay:.18s}
.phone-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-xl)}
.phone-card.winner{border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.4);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.08),var(--shadow-lg)}
.winner-tag{display:none;position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));color:white;border-radius:8px;padding:4px 10px}
.winner-tag.show{display:block;animation:tagPop .4s var(--spring) .4s both}
.card-img-wrap{width:100%;height:180px;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:20px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;transition:box-shadow .3s}
.card-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:16px;display:block;transition:transform .35s}
.phone-card:hover .card-img{transform:scale(1.06)}
.phone-card:hover .card-img-wrap{box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(37,99,235,.1)}
.img-fallback{font-size:3rem;display:none;user-select:none}
.card-top{margin-bottom:16px}
.card-num{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--t4);margin-bottom:4px}
.card-title{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--t1);line-height:1.3}
.score-row{margin-bottom:10px}
.row-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:4px}
.row-lbl{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--t2)}
.row-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--t3)}
.track{height:5px;background:#f1f5f9;border-radius:99px;overflow:hidden}
.fill{height:100%;border-radius:99px;width:0;transition:width 1s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
.score-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px}
.score-big-card{padding:22px;border-radius:14px;background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);text-align:center;animation:cardReveal .5s var(--spring) both}
#scard-a{animation-delay:.2s}#scard-b{animation-delay:.28s}
.score-big-name{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--t4);margin-bottom:10px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.score-big-num{font-size:3rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.05em;line-height:1;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;margin-bottom:4px}
.score-big-sub{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--t4);letter-spacing:.06em;font-weight:500}
.winner-banner{padding:22px 26px;border-radius:14px;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.18);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;margin-bottom:20px;animation:sectionUp .5s var(--ease) .3s both}
.winner-trophy{font-size:2.2rem;flex-shrink:0}
.winner-text h3{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:4px;color:var(--t1)}
.winner-text p{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.6}
.insight-card{padding:24px 28px;border-radius:var(--r-card);background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);animation:sectionUp .55s var(--ease) .35s both}
.insight-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
.insight-icon-wrap{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(37,99,235,.08);border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.18);display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:14px}
.insight-hdr-text{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--a1)}
.insight-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
.insight-block{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:15px 16px;animation:rowFade .4s var(--ease) both}
@keyframes rowFade{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.insight-block:nth-child(1){animation-delay:.1s}.insight-block:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.17s}.insight-block:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.24s}.insight-block:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.31s}
.ib-name{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--t4);margin-bottom:8px}
.ib-line{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:6px}
.ib-tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:.67rem;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;border-radius:6px;padding:3px 8px}
.ib-tag.good{color:#059669;background:rgba(5,150,105,.08);border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.2)}
.ib-tag.warn{color:#d97706;background:rgba(217,119,6,.08);border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,.2)}
.ib-tag.great{color:var(--a1);background:rgba(37,99,235,.08);border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.2)}
.prediction-card{padding:24px 28px;border-radius:var(--r-card);background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);margin-top:16px;animation:sectionUp .55s var(--ease) .4s both}
.pred-title{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--a2);margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.pred-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:13px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.pred-row:last-child{border:none;padding-bottom:0}
.pred-phone{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--t1);flex:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.pred-line{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--t2);flex:2;line-height:1.5}
.pred-badge{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;border-radius:7px;padding:4px 9px;flex-shrink:0}
.pred-badge.long{color:#059669;background:rgba(5,150,105,.08);border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.2)}
.pred-badge.short{color:#d97706;background:rgba(217,119,6,.08);border:1px solid rgba(217,119,6,.2)}
.pred-badge.top{color:var(--a1);background:rgba(37,99,235,.08);border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.2)}
.reset-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:center;margin-top:32px}
.reset-btn{background:none;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-btn);padding:11px 26px;color:var(--t3);font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.85rem;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,color .2s,background .2s}
.reset-btn:hover{border-color:var(--a1);color:var(--a1);background:rgba(37,99,235,.04)}
.empty-state{text-align:center;padding:36px 24px 80px;color:var(--t4)}
.empty-icon{font-size:2.6rem;margin-bottom:12px}
.empty-state p{font-size:.9rem}
.site-footer{text-align:center;padding:24px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--t4);font-size:.74rem;letter-spacing:.04em;margin-top:56px}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   LOGIN / SIGNUP MODAL
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.modal-overlay{
  position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(15,23,42,.65);
  backdrop-filter:blur(6px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  z-index:1000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:20px;animation:overlayIn .2s var(--ease) both
}
@keyframes overlayIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
.modal-box{
  background:white;border-radius:22px;
  width:100%;max-width:420px;
  box-shadow:0 32px 80px rgba(15,23,42,.22),0 0 0 1px rgba(15,23,42,.06);
  animation:modalUp .3s var(--spring) both;
  overflow:hidden;position:relative
}
@keyframes modalUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px) scale(.96)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.modal-header{
  padding:28px 28px 0;
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between
}
.modal-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px}
.modal-logo .logo-mark{width:30px;height:30px;font-size:13px}
.modal-logo .logo-name{font-size:1rem}
.modal-close{
  background:none;border:none;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;
  display:grid;place-items:center;cursor:pointer;color:var(--t4);
  font-size:1rem;transition:background .15s,color .15s;flex-shrink:0
}
.modal-close:hover{background:var(--bg);color:var(--t2)}
.modal-body{padding:20px 28px 28px}
.modal-tabs{
  display:flex;gap:0;background:var(--bg);
  border-radius:10px;padding:4px;margin-bottom:22px
}
.modal-tab{
  flex:1;padding:9px;border:none;border-radius:7px;
  background:transparent;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--t4);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s var(--ease)
}
.modal-tab.active{
  background:white;color:var(--t1);
  box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(15,23,42,.1),0 0 0 1px rgba(15,23,42,.04)
}
.modal-field{margin-bottom:14px}
.modal-label{display:block;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:6px}
.modal-input{
  width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:10px;padding:11px 14px;color:var(--t1);
  font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.9rem;outline:none;
  transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s,background .2s
}
.modal-input::placeholder{color:var(--t4)}
.modal-input:focus{background:white;border-color:var(--a1);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.1)}
.modal-input.error-field{border-color:#ef4444;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(239,68,68,.1)}
.modal-err{
  font-size:.75rem;color:#dc2626;font-weight:500;
  margin-top:-6px;margin-bottom:10px;display:none;
  padding:8px 12px;background:#fef2f2;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #fecaca
}
.modal-err.show{display:block;animation:rowFade .2s var(--ease)}
.modal-submit{
  width:100%;padding:13px;border:none;border-radius:11px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));
  color:#fff;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.92rem;font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer;margin-top:6px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:transform .2s var(--spring),box-shadow .2s;
  box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,.3)
}
.modal-submit::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.15),transparent 60%);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s
}
.modal-submit:hover{transform:translateY(-1px) scale(1.01);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(37,99,235,.42)}
.modal-submit:hover::after{opacity:1}
.modal-submit:active{transform:scale(.98)}
.modal-divider{text-align:center;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--t4);margin:14px 0;position:relative}
.modal-divider::before,.modal-divider::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:50%;width:40%;height:1px;background:var(--border)}
.modal-divider::before{left:0}.modal-divider::after{right:0}
.modal-footer-note{text-align:center;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--t4);margin-top:14px;line-height:1.5}
.modal-footer-note span{color:var(--a1);cursor:pointer;font-weight:600}
.modal-footer-note span:hover{text-decoration:underline}

/* ── Toast notification ── */
.toast{
  position:fixed;bottom:100px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);
  background:#1e293b;color:white;border-radius:12px;padding:12px 22px;
  font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;z-index:2000;opacity:0;
  transition:opacity .25s,transform .25s var(--spring);pointer-events:none;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;white-space:nowrap;
  box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.35)
}
.toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}

/* ── Ripple ── */
.ripple{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.35);transform:scale(0);animation:rippleAnim .55s linear;pointer-events:none}
@keyframes rippleAnim{to{transform:scale(4);opacity:0}}

[hidden]{display:none!important}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   FEATURED PHONES SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.featured-section{margin-top:28px;animation:sectionUp .65s var(--ease) .22s both}
.featured-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:16px}
@media(max-width:900px){.featured-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
@media(max-width:580px){.featured-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}
.fp-card{
  background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);cursor:pointer;animation:bpcReveal .45s var(--spring) both;
  transition:transform .3s var(--spring),box-shadow .3s var(--ease),border-color .25s
}
.fp-card:hover{transform:translateY(-7px) scale(1.02);box-shadow:var(--shadow-xl);border-color:var(--border-accent)}
.fp-img-wrap{
  width:100%;height:180px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#f8fafc,#f1f5f9);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;
  position:relative;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)
}
.fp-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:18px;transition:transform .45s var(--ease)}
.fp-card:hover .fp-img{transform:scale(1.1)}
.fp-badge{
  position:absolute;top:8px;left:8px;z-index:2;
  font-size:.58rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;
  padding:3px 9px;border-radius:99px;color:white
}
.fp-badge.flagship{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2))}
.fp-badge.premium{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a3),var(--a5))}
.fp-badge.new{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a4),#10b981)}
.fp-body{padding:13px 14px 10px}
.fp-name{font-size:.79rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1.35;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:4px;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.fp-price{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--a5);margin-bottom:8px}
.fp-specs-mini{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-bottom:10px}
.fp-spec-chip{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--t3);background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;padding:2px 7px}
.fp-actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px;padding:0 14px 14px}
.fp-btn-details{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;
  padding:8px 4px;border-radius:9px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));
  color:white;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;border:none;cursor:pointer;
  transition:transform .2s var(--spring),box-shadow .2s;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(37,99,235,.25)
}
.fp-btn-details:hover{transform:scale(1.04) translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(37,99,235,.38)}
.fp-btn-compare{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;
  padding:8px 4px;border-radius:9px;background:white;color:var(--t2);
  font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;border:1.5px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;
  transition:background .18s,border-color .18s,color .18s,transform .18s var(--spring)
}
.fp-btn-compare:hover{background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.3);color:var(--a1);transform:translateY(-1px)}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PRODUCT DETAIL PAGE (PDP) — SPA VIEW
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.pdp-overlay{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:600;background:var(--bg);
  overflow-y:auto;transform:translateX(105%);
  transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);will-change:transform
}
.pdp-overlay.open{transform:translateX(0)}
.pdp-inner{max-width:1060px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px 80px}
.pdp-nav{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:16px 0;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10;
  background:rgba(241,245,249,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px)
}
.pdp-back-btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
  background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r-btn);
  padding:9px 18px;color:var(--t2);font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;
  cursor:pointer;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);
  transition:background .18s,border-color .18s,color .18s,transform .18s var(--spring),box-shadow .18s
}
.pdp-back-btn:hover{background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.3);color:var(--a1);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-md)}
.pdp-breadcrumb{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--t4);overflow:hidden}
.pdp-breadcrumb-sep{color:var(--border-strong);flex-shrink:0}
.pdp-breadcrumb-current{color:var(--t2);font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.pdp-main{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;
  padding:36px 0 28px;align-items:start
}
@media(max-width:720px){.pdp-main{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:20px}}
/* Left */
.pdp-img-stage{
  background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;
  overflow:hidden;height:390px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);position:relative;transition:box-shadow .3s
}
.pdp-img-stage:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-xl)}
.pdp-phone-img{
  width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:32px;
  transition:transform .5s var(--ease);
}
.pdp-img-stage:hover .pdp-phone-img{transform:scale(1.07)}
.pdp-view-photos{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:7px;margin-top:11px;width:100%;
  background:white;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
  padding:11px 0;color:var(--t2);font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;
  cursor:pointer;transition:background .18s,border-color .18s,color .18s
}
.pdp-view-photos:hover{background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.3);color:var(--a1)}
/* Right */
.pdp-tier-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.pdp-tier-badge{
  font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;
  padding:4px 12px;border-radius:99px;color:white
}
.pdp-tier-flagship{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2))}
.pdp-tier-premium{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a5),#dc2626)}
.pdp-tier-mid{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a4),#10b981)}
.pdp-tier-budget{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--t3),var(--t2))}
.pdp-new-tag{
  font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;
  padding:4px 12px;border-radius:99px;
  background:rgba(5,150,105,.1);border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,.3);color:var(--a4)
}
.pdp-phone-name{
  font-size:clamp(1.25rem,3vw,1.75rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.03em;
  line-height:1.2;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:10px
}
.pdp-rating-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;margin-bottom:16px}
.pdp-stars{color:#f59e0b;font-size:1.05rem;letter-spacing:.5px}
.pdp-rating-num{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t2)}
.pdp-rating-count{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--t4)}
.pdp-price-row{
  display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;margin-bottom:22px;
  padding-bottom:22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)
}
.pdp-price{
  font-family:var(--mono);font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a5),#dc2626);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text
}
.pdp-price-label{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--t4);font-weight:500}
.pdp-key-specs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px}
.pdp-ks{
  background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
  padding:12px 10px;text-align:center;
  transition:background .18s,border-color .18s,transform .2s var(--spring)
}
.pdp-ks:hover{background:#eff6ff;border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.2);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.pdp-ks-icon{font-size:1.25rem;margin-bottom:5px}
.pdp-ks-val{font-size:.79rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:2px;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.pdp-ks-label{font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;font-weight:500;color:var(--t4)}
.pdp-scores{margin-bottom:22px}
.pdp-scores-title{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--t4);margin-bottom:12px}
.pdp-score-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:9px}
.pdp-score-label{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--t2);width:78px;flex-shrink:0}
.pdp-score-track{flex:1;height:6px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:99px;overflow:hidden}
.pdp-score-fill{height:100%;border-radius:99px;width:0;transition:width 1s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) .35s}
.pdp-score-fill.perf{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--a1),#60a5fa)}
.pdp-score-fill.cam{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--a2),#a78bfa)}
.pdp-score-fill.bat{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--a4),#34d399)}
.pdp-score-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--t3);width:30px;text-align:right;flex-shrink:0}
.pdp-compare-btn{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;
  width:100%;padding:15px 24px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));
  border:none;border-radius:var(--r-btn);color:white;
  font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,.3);
  transition:transform .22s var(--spring),box-shadow .22s
}
.pdp-compare-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.02) translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(37,99,235,.42)}
.pdp-compare-btn:active{transform:scale(.98)}
.pdp-compare-btn::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.15),transparent 60%);opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s}
.pdp-compare-btn:hover::after{opacity:1}
/* Specs table */
.pdp-specs-section{margin-top:32px}
.pdp-specs-section-title{font-size:1.08rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.025em;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px}
.pdp-specs-group{background:white;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;margin-bottom:14px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm)}
.pdp-specs-group-title{
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--t2);
  padding:13px 20px;background:var(--bg);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px
}
.pdp-spec-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:170px 1fr;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:background .15s}
.pdp-spec-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.pdp-spec-row:hover{background:#fafbff}
.pdp-spec-key{font-size:.76rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--t3);padding:13px 20px;background:var(--bg-2);border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
.pdp-spec-val{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--t1);padding:13px 20px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.5}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .pdp-spec-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .pdp-spec-key{background:transparent;border-right:none;padding-bottom:2px;font-size:.68rem;color:var(--t4)}
  .pdp-spec-val{padding-top:4px;padding-bottom:12px}
}
@media(max-width:720px){
  .pdp-img-stage{height:300px}
  .pdp-price{font-size:1.6rem}
}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   RESPONSIVE
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@media(max-width:780px){
  .hero{padding:56px 0 40px}
  .hero-stats{gap:22px}
  .selector-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:12px;padding:22px}
  .vs-col{flex-direction:row;padding-top:0;justify-content:center}
  .vs-line{width:50px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--border),transparent)}
  .priority-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .cards-row,.score-strip,.insight-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .winner-banner{flex-direction:column;text-align:center}
  .pred-row{flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
  .budget-cards-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .budget-input-row{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch}
  .budget-find-btn{justify-content:center}
  .budget-results-top{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
  .budget-search-wrap{max-width:100%}
  .floating-compare{width:calc(100% - 48px)}
  .compare-btn-float{width:100%;justify-content:center}
  .features-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .brands-track{gap:10px}
  .brand-card{min-width:80px;padding:12px 14px}
}
@media(max-width:460px){
  .hero-title{font-size:2.4rem}
  .priority-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .budget-cards-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .budget-presets{gap:8px}
  .fpc{max-width:80px}
  .features-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
}

import type { Metadata } from "next";
import "./globals.css";

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "SpecDuel — Premium Phone Comparison",
  description:
    "Compare latest smartphones with real data, prices, and performance insights.",
};

export const viewport = {
  width: "device-width" as const,
  initialScale: 1,
};

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: Readonly<{
  children: React.ReactNode;
}>) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <head>
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
        <link
          rel="preconnect"
          href="https://fonts.gstatic.com"
          crossOrigin="anonymous"
        />
        <link
          href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap"
          rel="stylesheet"
        />
      </head>
      <body>{children}</body>
    </html>
  );
}

################################################################################
# FILE: src\components\specduel\AuthModal.tsx
################################################################################

export default function AuthModal() {
  return (
    <div
      id="authModal"
      style={{ display: "none", position: "fixed", inset: 0, zIndex: 1000 }}
    >
      <div className="modal-overlay" id="modalOverlay">
        <div className="modal-box">
          <div className="modal-header">
            <div className="modal-logo">
              <div className="logo-mark">⚡</div>
              <span className="logo-name">SpecDuel</span>
            </div>
            <button
              className="modal-close"
              id="modalClose"
              type="button"
              aria-label="Close"
            >
              ✕
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="modal-body">
            <div className="modal-tabs">
              <button className="modal-tab active" id="tabLogin" type="button">
                Login
              </button>
              <button className="modal-tab" id="tabSignup" type="button">
                Sign Up
              </button>
            </div>

            <div id="loginForm">
              <div className="modal-field">
                <label className="modal-label" htmlFor="loginEmail">
                  Email address
                </label>
                <input
                  type="email"
                  id="loginEmail"
                  className="modal-input"
                  placeholder="you@example.com"
                  autoComplete="email"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="modal-field">
                <label className="modal-label" htmlFor="loginPass">
                  Password
                </label>
                <input
                  type="password"
                  id="loginPass"
                  className="modal-input"
                  placeholder="Enter your password"
                  autoComplete="current-password"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="modal-err" id="loginErr">
                Invalid email or password. Please try again.
              </div>
              <button
                className="modal-submit ripple-host"
                id="loginSubmit"
                type="button"
              >
                Login →
              </button>
              <p className="modal-footer-note">
                Don&apos;t have an account?{" "}
                <span id="switchToSignup">Sign up free</span>
              </p>
            </div>

            <div id="signupForm" style={{ display: "none" }}>
              <div className="modal-field">
                <label className="modal-label" htmlFor="signupName">
                  Your name
                </label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  id="signupName"
                  className="modal-input"
                  placeholder="e.g. Rahul Sharma"
                  autoComplete="name"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="modal-field">
                <label className="modal-label" htmlFor="signupEmail">
                  Email address
                </label>
                <input
                  type="email"
                  id="signupEmail"
                  className="modal-input"
                  placeholder="you@example.com"
                  autoComplete="email"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="modal-field">
                <label className="modal-label" htmlFor="signupPass">
                  Password
                </label>
                <input
                  type="password"
                  id="signupPass"
                  className="modal-input"
                  placeholder="Min 6 characters"
                  autoComplete="new-password"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="modal-err" id="signupErr">
                Please fill in all fields correctly.
              </div>
              <button
                className="modal-submit ripple-host"
                id="signupSubmit"
                type="button"
              >
                Create Account →
              </button>
              <p className="modal-footer-note">
                Already have an account?{" "}
                <span id="switchToLogin">Login here</span>
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default function BudgetSection() {
  return (
    <section className="budget-section">
      <div className="step-badge">
        <div className="step-num">1</div> Set Your Budget
      </div>
      <div className="glass budget-panel">
        <div className="budget-header">
          <div className="budget-icon-wrap">₹</div>
          <span className="budget-hdr-text">
            Price Range — Find phones that fit your pocket
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="budget-presets">
          <button className="bp-btn" data-min="0" data-max="15000">
            Under ₹15K
          </button>
          <button className="bp-btn" data-min="15000" data-max="25000">
            ₹15K – ₹25K
          </button>
          <button className="bp-btn" data-min="25000" data-max="45000">
            ₹25K – ₹45K
          </button>
          <button className="bp-btn" data-min="45000" data-max="80000">
            ₹45K – ₹80K
          </button>
          <button className="bp-btn" data-min="80000" data-max="999999">
            ₹80K+
          </button>
        </div>
        <div className="budget-input-row">
          <div className="budget-input-wrap">
            <span className="budget-prefix">₹</span>
            <input
              type="number"
              id="budgetInput"
              className="budget-input"
              placeholder="Enter your max budget…"
              min={1000}
              max={999999}
            />
          </div>
          <button className="budget-find-btn" id="budgetFindBtn" type="button">
            <span>Find Phones</span>
            <span>→</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="budget-results" id="budgetResults" hidden>
        <div className="budget-results-top">
          <div className="budget-results-headline-row">
            <h2>Phones in Your Budget</h2>
            <span className="budget-count" id="budgetCount" />
          </div>
          <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              gap: 12,
              flexWrap: "wrap",
            }}
          >
            <div className="budget-search-wrap">
              <span className="budget-search-ico">
                <svg
                  width="13"
                  height="13"
                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                  fill="none"
                  stroke="currentColor"
                  strokeWidth="2.5"
                  aria-hidden
                >
                  <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8" />
                  <path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35" />
                </svg>
              </span>
              <input
                type="text"
                id="budgetSearchInput"
                className="budget-search-input"
                placeholder="Search in results…"
                autoComplete="off"
              />
            </div>
            <button
              className="budget-compare-btn"
              id="budgetCompareBtn"
              type="button"
            >
              <span id="budgetCompareBtnLabel">⚡ Compare Now</span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="slot-indicators">
          <div className="slot-indicator" id="slotIndA">
            <div className="slot-indicator-dot" />
            <span id="slotIndAText">Slot A — empty</span>
          </div>
          <div className="slot-indicator" id="slotIndB">
            <div className="slot-indicator-dot" />
            <span id="slotIndBText">Slot B — empty</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="budget-cards-grid" id="budgetGrid" />
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

const features = [
  {
    feat: "5g",
    icon: "📶",
    iconClass: "",
    label: "5G Phones",
    desc: "Future-ready network",
  },
  {
    feat: "ram8",
    icon: "🧠",
    iconClass: "green",
    label: "8GB & Above RAM",
    desc: "Smooth multitasking",
  },
  {
    feat: "storage256",
    icon: "💾",
    iconClass: "purple",
    label: "256GB+ Storage",
    desc: "Never run out of space",
  },
  {
    feat: "slim",
    icon: "🪄",
    iconClass: "orange",
    label: "Slimmest Phones",
    desc: "Ultra-thin design",
  },
  {
    feat: "120hz",
    icon: "🔄",
    iconClass: "teal",
    label: "120Hz Refresh Rate",
    desc: "Silky smooth display",
  },
  {
    feat: "ai",
    icon: "🤖",
    iconClass: "pink",
    label: "AI Smartphones",
    desc: "Intelligent features",
  },
] as const;

export default function FeaturesSection() {
  return (
    <section className="features-section">
      <div className="section-header">
        <span className="section-title">⚡ Mobiles by Popular Features</span>
        <span className="section-sub">Click to filter budget results</span>
      </div>
      <div className="features-grid">
        {features.map((f) => (
          <div
            key={f.feat}
            className="feat-item"
            data-feat={f.feat}
          >

              <div className="feat-label">{f.label}</div>
              <div className="feat-desc">{f.desc}</div>
            </div>
            <span className="feat-arrow">›</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

export default function Navbar() {
  return (
    <nav className="site-nav">
      <a className="logo" href="#">
        <div className="logo-mark">⚡</div>
        <span className="logo-name">SpecDuel</span>

}
