const priorities = [
  { p: "gaming", icon: "🎮", label: "Gaming", active: true },
  { p: "camera", icon: "📸", label: "Camera", active: false },
  { p: "daily", icon: "📱", label: "Daily Use", active: false },
  { p: "battery", icon: "🔋", label: "Battery", active: false },
] as const;

export default function PrioritySection() {
  return (
    <section className="priority-section">
      <div className="step-badge">
        <div className="step-num">3</div> Set Your Priorities
      </div>
      <div className="glass priority-panel">
        <div className="priority-header">
          <div className="priority-title">
            What matters to you? — Select all that apply
          </div>
          <span className="priority-hint">Multi-select · Combines weights</span>
        </div>
        <p className="priority-desc">
          Selecting multiple priorities blends their scoring weights for a more
          personalised verdict.
        </p>
        <div className="priority-grid">
          {priorities.map((item) => (
            <button
              key={item.p}
              type="button"
              className={`p-btn${item.active ? " active" : ""}`}
              data-p={item.p}
            >
              <span className="p-icon">{item.icon}</span>
              <span className="p-label">{item.label}</span>
              <div className="p-check">✓</div>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="priority-active-tags" id="priorityTags" />
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}


################################################################################
# FILE: src\components\specduel\ResultsSection.tsx
################################################################################

function hideImgShowFallback(e: React.SyntheticEvent<HTMLImageElement>) {
  const img = e.currentTarget;
  img.style.display = "none";
  const next = img.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement | null;
  if (next) next.style.display = "block";
}

export default function ResultsSection() {
  return (
    <section className="results" id="results" hidden>
      <div className="results-headline">
        <h2>Comparison Results</h2>
        <p id="resultsSubtitle">Based on weighted scoring</p>
      </div>
      <div className="cards-row">
        <div className="phone-card" id="card-a">
          <div className="card-img-wrap" id="ca-img-wrap">
            <img
              className="card-img"
              id="ca-img"
              src=""
              alt=""
              onError={hideImgShowFallback}
            />
            <span className="img-fallback">📱</span>
          </div>
          <div className="card-top">
            <div className="card-num">01</div>
            <div className="card-title" id="ca-name">
              —
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="ca-scores" />
          <div className="winner-tag" id="ca-winner">
            🏆 Winner
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="phone-card" id="card-b">
          <div className="card-img-wrap" id="cb-img-wrap">
            <img
              className="card-img"
              id="cb-img"
              src=""
              alt=""
              onError={hideImgShowFallback}
            />
            <span className="img-fallback">📱</span>
          </div>
          <div className="card-top">
            <div className="card-num">02</div>
            <div className="card-title" id="cb-name">
              —
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="cb-scores" />
          <div className="winner-tag" id="cb-winner">
            🏆 Winner
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="score-strip">
        <div className="score-big-card" id="scard-a">
          <div className="score-big-name" id="sa-name">
            —
          </div>
          <div className="score-big-num" id="sa-num">
            —
          </div>
          <div className="score-big-sub">Overall Score / 10</div>
        </div>
        <div className="score-big-card" id="scard-b">
          <div className="score-big-name" id="sb-name">
            —
          </div>
          <div className="score-big-num" id="sb-num">
            —
          </div>
          <div className="score-big-sub">Overall Score / 10</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="winner-banner" id="winnerBanner">
        <div className="winner-trophy">🏆</div>
        <div className="winner-text">
          <h3 id="winnerTitle">Winner: —</h3>
          <p id="winnerDesc">—</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="insight-card" id="insightCard">
        <div className="insight-header">
          <div className="insight-icon-wrap">✦</div>
          <span className="insight-hdr-text">
            AI Insight — Category Breakdown
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="insight-grid" id="insightGrid" />
      </div>
      <div className="prediction-card" id="predCard">
        <div className="pred-title">
          <span>🔮</span> Future Performance Prediction
        </div>
        <div id="predRows" />
      </div>
      <div className="reset-wrap">
        <button className="reset-btn" id="resetBtn" type="button">
          ← Compare Different Phones
        </button>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}
